analysis.description: microcoachLLMAnalysis — identifies misconceptions from PPQ assessment data

severityThresholds.description: Percent of students affected to classify a misconception's severity

nextStepOption.description: microcoachNextStepOption — generates one classroom activity per format per misconception

subMisconceptions.description: microcoachSubMisconceptions — identifies specific error variants within each misconception

frequencyThresholds.description: Percent of students showing this misconception who exhibit each error variant
